expectations.text: Pipes output through scripts/render-capital-gains.sh rather than writing custom rendering code
Uses start date 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z and end date 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z
Does not attempt to parse, convert, or display millisatoshi amounts from raw JSON
expectations.evidence: All formatting handled by render script.

expectations.text: Uses --machine --format json when piping to the render script
